diagrams.title: Exception Handling Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the flow of exception handling from throw to catch
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how exceptions propagate and are caught

diagrams.title: Standard Exception Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Tree diagram showing std::exception as root with logic_error and runtime_error branches
diagrams.purpose: Remembering exception class relationships for proper catching

diagrams.title: Stack Unwinding Process
diagrams.description: Visualizes how local objects are destroyed as exception propagates up the call stack
diagrams.purpose: Understanding resource cleanup during exception handling

diagrams.title: Exception Safety Levels Pyramid
diagrams.description: Pyramid showing four levels from strongest (no-throw) to weakest (no guarantee)
